programs.programName: Commodity Supplemental Food Program (CSFP) - Senior Box Program

verified.notes: Income limits based on 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines effective February 2026 per Feeding Louisiana CSFP page. Phone number is for Los Angeles Regional Food Bank CSFP program; Louisiana-specific contact should be verified via Feeding Louisiana regional food banks. Asset limits not found in search results.

programs.notes: Income limits based on 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines effective February 2026 per Feeding Louisiana CSFP page. verified.notes: SPAS program is active as of 2026. Age requirement is 18 years minimum per official LDH source. No income or asset limits found in official sources for SPAS (distinct from Louisiana's separate Long Term-Personal Care Services program which has income limits). Phone number is The Arc of Louisiana's official SPAS line per LDH and Arc websites. One source mentions age range 18-60 with continuation after 60, but primary LDH source states '18 years old or older' with no upper limit.

verified.notes: No program specifically named 'Caregiver Voucher Program' found in search results. Louisiana offers Medicaid-funded in-home caregiving programs (up to $1,800/month via Monitored In-Home Caregiving) and caregiver stipends (up to $2,750/month via PCAFC for veterans), but detailed eligibility criteria (age, income, asset limits, application phone) are not provided in available sources. Recommend contacting Louisiana Department of Health or DCFS directly for authoritative program details.
